data.title: Rich Bursek of Certuity announces expansion with three strategic Managing Director appointments in Q4 2025.
data.description: In January 13, 2026, in North Palm Beach, Florida, Rich Bursek, the President and Partner of Certuity, disclosed the expansion of the multi-family office's leadership team and national presence in the last quarter of 2025. Three key Managing Director positions were filled strategically, contributing to the growth and breadth of the organization.

data.title: Americans Cutting Back on Retirement Savings, Allianz Life Study Finds
data.description: Minneapolis-based research reveals that amid the current economic climate, Americans are reducing their retirement contributions. The latest Q4 2025 Quarterly Market Perceptions Study from Allianz Life indicates a decline in optimism about financial prospects compared to the previous year. Findings show that 66% of individuals have scaled back their savings in the last six months. With fewer Americans hopeful for an improved financial outlook, it is evident that many are facing challenges in sustaining their retirement funds.

data.title: Silver Cross introduces new Unfolding Family of Strollers Nia and Breez, promising a revolution in convenience and design.
data.description: A significant development in family mobility is set to take place in North Yorkshire, England, as renowned British nursery brand Silver Cross, known for inventing the first pram back in 1877, is gearing up to transform the stroller market once more. The company has introduced its groundbreaking Unfolding Family of Strollers, featuring the innovative models Nia and Breez.

data.title: Six experts from The Brattle Group named Principal. Includes Josh Figueroa, Dr. Nathalie Hinchey, Farooq Javed, Dr. Zening Li, Tania Tholot, and Julia Zhu.
data.description: In Boston on January 13, 2026, The Brattle Group revealed the promotion of six employees to the prestigious position of Principal. The individuals who achieved this milestone are Josh Figueroa, Dr. Nathalie Hinchey, Farooq Javed, Dr. Zening Li, Tania Tholot, and Julia Zhu. This announcement underscores the company's commitment to recognizing and elevating talent within its ranks.

data.title: J.F. Lehman & Company acquires Wellman Dynamics, specializing in aerospace, defense, maritime sectors.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, a prominent alternative asset manager, J.F. Lehman & Company ("JFLCO"), specializing in aerospace, defense, government, maritime, environmental, and infrastructure sectors, revealed that an investment affiliate of JFL Equity has made a significant move.

data.title: GovCIO achieves early milestone in VA's RES modernization, deploying Phase 1 ahead of schedule on Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: In Fairfax, Virginia, on January 13, 2026, GovCIO announced the successful early implementation of Phase 1 of the Readiness and Employment System (RES). This marks a significant achievement in the ongoing modernization efforts of the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) in enhancing the Veteran Readiness and Employment (VR&E) program. This milestone highlights the progress made in improving services for veterans, with a focus on preparing them for employment opportunities.

data.title: AmberSemi to chair industry session at APEC '26 focusing on power delivery for AI processors with key partners.
data.description: Amber Semiconductor, Inc. (AmberSemi™) will be hosting a technical industry session in Dublin, California on January 13, 2026. The session will include leading companies such as AMD, Nvidia, and Global Foundries, and will focus on advancing high-power solutions for upcoming AI processors in data centers. AmberSemi™, a fabless semiconductor company, will be at the forefront of this collaborative effort to drive innovation in the industry. This strategic session aims to address the growing demand for high-performance computing with key players coming together to shape the future of AI processors.

data.title: Dr. Taz Bhatia launches hol+, a holistic health experience integrating eastern and western medicine, offering primary and consultative care.
data.description: An innovative approach to healthcare has been introduced by Dr. Taz Bhatia, a renowned expert in modernized holistic medicine, through the launch of hol+. This new functional medical facility in Atlanta aims to blend traditional healing practices with modern medical advancements to provide comprehensive primary and consultative care in one location. Dr. Bhatia, a triple board-certified physician and integrative medicine pioneer, has created a unique health concept that combines eastern and western medicine. The facility is designed to offer a holistic approach to healthcare, catering to a wide range of patients seeking integrated medical services.

data.title: Coca-Cola to release Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb. 10 before NYSE opens. Investor call at 8:30 a.m. ET. CEO-elect to present on Feb. 17 at 10 a.m. ET.
data.description: Atlanta-based Coca-Cola Company revealed that it is set to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 10th prior to the opening of the New York Stock Exchange. Following this announcement, an investor conference call is scheduled to take place at 8:30 a.m. ET to analyze the results. Moreover, the company disclosed that its incoming CEO, Henrique Braun, along with Executive Vice President and COO, and President and CFO, John Murphy, will participate in a presentation on February 17th at 10 a.m. ET during the Consu event.

data.title: Joseph C. Ballman replaces Jeff Reich on CHPA Board of Directors after his two terms.
data.description: A leading furniture rental and transition services provider, CORT, which is a Berkshire Hathaway company, recently disclosed that Joseph C. Ballman, CCHP, has been chosen as the newest member of the Corporate Housing Providers Association (CHPA) Board of Directors. Ballman will take over from Jeff Reich, who served two back-to-back terms totaling six years on the board. This news comes after Jeff Reich's election to the CHPA Board of Directors in 2020.
